objective: Get ready to pick stuff up and put it in places, because you've just entered TextWorld! Here is how to play! First, it would be a great idea if you could travel east. Okay, and then, travel north. And then, go north. Once you accomplish that, make an effort to go west. And then, attempt to venture north. With that done, attempt to go east. Following that, go to the south. Then, venture west. If you can do that, venture south. And then, pick-up the coin from the floor of the chamber. And once you've done that, you win!
